subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who hath created the luminous reality, the merciful essence, the spiritual being, and the divine substance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن خلق حقیقه نورانیه و هویه رحمانیه و کینونه روحانیه و جوهره ربانیه
subcodes.subjects: @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
